name: vantage-server
description: Vantage 后端：接收 Claude Code / Codex 使用情况上报并存入 JSONL

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test src/ulid.test.ts src/redact.test.ts src/store.test.ts src/s3.test.ts src/archive.test.ts src/merge.test.ts src/stats.test.ts lambda/ingest.test.ts lambda/rebuild.test.ts lambda/handler.test.ts
scripts.build:lambda: rm -rf dist/lambda dist/vantage-lambda.zip && tsc -p tsconfig.lambda.json && cp lambda/package.lambda.json dist/lambda/package.json && npm install --prefix dist/lambda --omit=dev && cd dist/lambda && zip -rq ../vantage-lambda.zip .
